scenes.title: Welcome to TypeScript Generics
scenes.narration: In this video, you'll learn how TypeScript generics help you write reusable, type-safe code. We'll start with the basics and build up to advanced patterns.

scenes.title: What are Generics?
scenes.narration: Generics are like variables for types. Instead of writing separate functions for different types, you write one function that works with any type. Think of them as type-level functions.

scenes.title: Generic Constraints
scenes.narration: Sometimes you need to restrict what types can be used. TypeScript lets you constrain generics using the extends keyword. This ensures your generic type has certain properties.
